summary: High‑quality matrix mix captures an overlooked Winterland night that every Deadhead should own.
review: The reviewer praises the soundboard‑plus‑audience (matrix) mix as a standout feature, calling the recording "everything" and urging fans to grab it. While no specific songs are highlighted, the overall tone is enthusiastic, suggesting the performance is solid throughout despite being eclipsed by other shows from the same run.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it rates the show 4 ★ and lauds the matrix mix; thus the combined show‑and‑recording quality is judged good to very good.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer loves the soundboard + audience blend, noting clear and enjoyable mixes with no complaints.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer indicates the entire show is worth owning.
